params.name: Glory Stone
params.description: Before travelers arrived, certain protomons had possessed extraordinary Glory. However, due to changing environments, these creatures have vanished, leaving only these stone tablets with records about them...
params.ss1: For each Divine Form obtained, get 30 Form Emblem(s)
params.ss2: For each Divine Form obtained, get 40 Form Emblem(s)
params.ss3: For each Divine Form obtained, get 50 Form Emblem(s)
params.ss4: For each Divine Form obtained, get 50 Form Emblem(s)
